title: Mussatia prieurii

The classification of Mussatia prieurii is within the genus Mussatia, which is part of the family Berberidaceae. The plant is a type of yellow-flowering climber and is often used in ornamental horticulture. Further classification of Mussatia prieurii includes its rank as a species within the genus and its membership in the kingdom Plantae.
